meta.title: Agar.io v2.0
meta.description: Eat cells smaller than you and don't get eaten by the bigger ones, as an MMO

lobby.title: Agar.io v2.0
lobby.discordSuggestions: Join us on Discord if you have suggestions

settings.keyRebindHint: Click a button and press a key to rebind
settings.mouseHint: Configure what action each mouse button performs

connecting.firewall: If you cannot connect to the servers, check if you have some antivirus or firewall blocking the connection.
connecting.multisessionBody:
Multiple game instances are not allowed.
Close all other game instances and reload.
connecting.oldBrowserLink: Please click here to update your Browser to a newer version.
connecting.bannedBody: You are banned from the game because you broke the rules either spamming the chat or while uploading custom skins.
connecting.bannedBodyBots: You are banned from the game because you broke the rules either spamming the chat or while uploading custom skins or because you are using bots.

errors.browserUnsupported: Your browser does not support required features, please update your browser.
errors.nicknameRequired: Please enter a nickname to play.
errors.nicknameDisallowed: This nickname is not allowed. Please choose a different nickname.

canvas.minionSpectator: You are using Free-Camera Spectator view, press {key} to switch back
canvas.minionControl: You are controlling a minion, press {key} to switch back

gameplay.rule1: Don't upload forbbiden custom skins, especially if it's someone's face, you might get your skin banned or yourself banned from the game.
gameplay.rule2: Don't use other people's nicknames in chat or as your name in a derogatory way, you might get muted or banned from the game.
gameplay.controlsIntro:
Move your MOUSE / TOUCH to control your Cell
Mouse Wheel or F and V to Zoom in and out
Press W or Left Click to Eject Mass
Press SPACE to Split your Cell once
Press X or Right Click to do a Double Split
Press C or Middle Click to do a Multi Split
gameplay.objective: Objective: The objective of Agar.io is to grow your cell by consuming smaller cells and avoiding larger ones. As you grow, you'll become more formidable and be able to consume even larger cells.
gameplay.startingOut: Starting Out: When you first join the game, you'll start as a small cell. Move around using your mouse to collect the colorful pellets scattered across the map. Eating pellets increases your size and mass.
gameplay.movement: Movement: To move your cell, you simply move your mouse cursor or use your touch screen by moving in the direction you want your cell to go. Your cell will follow the movement of your mouse cursor on the screen.
gameplay.consumeSmaller: Consume Smaller Cells: Keep an eye out for smaller cells roaming nearby. As you grow larger, you'll be able to engulf these smaller cells to increase your mass. Approach them strategically to avoid being eaten by larger cells.
gameplay.avoidLarger: Avoid Larger Cells: Be cautious of larger cells, as they can consume you if you're smaller than they. Watch out for players who split to capture smaller cells, and try to anticipate their movements to stay safe.
gameplay.splitting: Splitting: You can split your cell into multiple smaller pieces by pressing SPACE. Use this tactic to capture smaller cells or to escape from larger ones. You can also do a multiple splits by pressing X or Z. Remember, splitting also makes you more vulnerable, so use it wisely.
gameplay.ejectingMass: Ejecting Mass: While ejecting mass by pressing the W or Left Click can be beneficial, it also comes with risks. Ejected mass can be consumed by other players, including potential rivals. Additionally, ejecting mass reduces your cell's overall size, which may make you more vulnerable to being consumed by larger cells.
gameplay.teamPlay: Team Play (Optional): In team mode, you can collaborate with other players to dominate the leaderboard. Team up with friends or other players to outmaneuver your opponents and conquer the game together.
gameplay.growDominate: Grow and Dominate: As you consume smaller cells and avoid being eaten, your cell will continue to grow in size. Aim to become the largest cell on the server and dominate the leaderboard.
gameplay.viruses: Watch Out for Viruses: Throughout the map, you'll encounter green spiky circles known as viruses. Avoid colliding with these, as they can split your cell into smaller pieces if you're larger than they. Feeding viruses your mass from a direction will cause them to multiply in the opposite direction.
gameplay.beStrategic: Be Strategic: Agar.io is as much about strategy as it is about skill. Pay attention to your surroundings, anticipate your opponents' moves, and use tactics like splitting and merging wisely to outsmart your rivals.
gameplay.closing: That's it for the basics of Agar.io! Now it's time to jump into the game and start growing your cell to become the biggest and most dominant player on the server.

items: Improved Cell Names, Cell Mass and Cell Jelly Physics rendering performance when they are enabled in Settings
Added Slower Mass Updates in Settings with a slider to control how often mass numbers refresh (dragging slider to the right means lower updates)
Nicknames now need to be at least 3 characters
Added optional Words Censorship for Chat and Nicknames, it's enabled by default, you can disable it, but then don't complain on Discord about people being toxic
Fixed Spectator Free-Camera Toggle, now you can toggle from Auto Follow players to Free-Camera properly in Spectator mode
Nicknames are now Required you can't have empty Nicknames anymore
Improved Mute Player Function now Mute will try to differentiate between Players with same Nickname and try to Mute just the one you wanted
Added Zoom In and Zoom Out Mobile Buttons, you can toggle Show Zoom Slider to Show or Hide them in Settings
Improved Mobile Buttons Position Customization, now you can Tap for 3 seconds on any Button to move it around
Added Reset Mobile Buttons Positions in Settings if you want to reset the Mobile Buttons to the Default positions
Added Lock Mobile Buttons in Settings if you check this you cannot move the buttons
Removed Flip Touch Controls from Settings (no longer needed, you can now move the Buttons wherever you want)
Added Customizable Keyboard Buttons and Mouse Buttons in Settings
Added Camera Smoothing and Cell Animations Speed in Settings
Improved how Skins are loaded to make it harder to copy them
Improved Identicons to not change so often
Added Player Mute/Unmute Button you can now Mute/Unmute specific Players from Chat by pressing the Mute/Unmute Icon next to their message or using the Muted Players list in Settings
Added Chat Scroll, you can scroll now either by with dragging scrollbar with the Mouse or using ↑ Arrow Up and ↓ Arrow Down keys
Added PVP Game Mode still in Beta
Added Cell Transparency checkbox in Settings
Added <kbd>F</kbd> and <kbd>V</kbd> keys to Zoom in and out
Added Zoom Slider to Zoom in and out
Added Show Zoom Slider checkbox in Settings
Added Clear Chat button, so you can clear the chat manually
Added Identicons to better identify friends or enemies, each device has a specific unique Icon
Added Show Identicons checkbox in Settings
Removed tricks that allow to duplicate Nicks or Skins easily
Fixed AZERTY keyboard mapping now W and Z both Feed
Changed Muti Split to key C instead of Z
Added Disable Touch Controls checkbox in Settings
Fixed a long-standing bug in Chat that prevented showing some messages sometimes
You can now see Spectator's nicknames if they have one set
Now you can push Viruses by ejecting your Cell's mass towards the Viruses
Adjusted AntiSpam measures to be more forgiving in Chat, also re-enabled Pasting messages
Added Toggle Fullscreen checkbox in Settings
Implemented AutoRespawn, now you will automatically respawn without needing to press Play again
Added Toggle AutoRespawn checkbox in Settings
Improved Touch Controls for mobile (added Show Menu Button, Fullscreen Button, fixed Split Button distance, prevent dragging Buttons)
Splitting while using Touch controls ejected a bit of mass, this bug has now been fixed
Eject Macro is now working while using Touch controls
Improved Touch controls for mobile
Added AntiSpam measures to Chat, disabled Pasting messages
Re-enabled using Right Click on Menus and in Chat Box
Added possibility to Flip Touch Controls from right side to left side in Settings
Added reCaptcha v3 to prevent bots connecting (you can give some feedback on Discord if it's not working properly)
Enabled auto-reconnect to server after a server restart
Improved Touch controls for mobile
Added Copy To Clipboard button for Current Selected Skin
Increased Chat Area Size to fit more messages
Reduced Wait Time for Upload Skin to 30 seconds
Implemented Touch Joystick for mobile
Added Touch Joystick checkbox in Settings
Uploading <kbd>gif</kbd> files is no longer allowed, the animation didn't work anyway, just first frame was shown
Implemented Upload Skin feature
Added toggle Individual Mouse Clicks checkboxes in Settings
Added custom Background Color picker
Added Double Split, you can use Double Split by pressing X or Right Click
Added Multi Split Macro, you can use Multi Split Macro by pressing C or Middle Click
Added toggle checkbox in Settings for Multi Split Macro
Added Nickname picker
Added Skin Name picker
Added custom Cell Name Color picker
Added custom Cell Background Color picker
Added custom Cell Border Color picker
Added Dark Theme for menus
Fixed random background colors when using Jelly Physics
Added Feed Macro, you can use Feed Macro by pressing W or Left Click and having Feed Macro checkbox checked in Settings
Added toggle checkbox in Settings for Feed Macro
Added News section
Added Gameplay section
Implemented skins that start with <kbd>$</kbd>
Prevented synthetic events generated by injected scripts
Disallowed all other custom clients
Added 1195 missing Skins
